SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class EmailService

java.lang.Object
server.controller.EmailService
public class EmailService extends Object
Service class responsible for handling all email communications using the SendGrid API. Supports sending confirmations, cancellations, employee credentials, subscriber welcomes, reminders, and receipts.

  • Constructor Details

    • EmailService

      public EmailService()

  • Method Details

    • setService

      private static void setService()
      Initializes the SendGrid service configuration. Sets the API key from the environment variables and configures the sender address.

    • sendConfirmation

      public static void sendConfirmation(Customer customer, Order order)
      Sends a booking confirmation email to the customer. Includes reservation details such as date, time, guests, and confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer entity associated with the order.
      order - The order entity containing reservation details.

    • sendCancelation

      public static void sendCancelation(Customer customer, Order order)
      Sends a cancellation notification email to the customer.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer entity.
      order - The order that was cancelled.

    • sendEmail

      public static void sendEmail(String employeeEmail, Employee employee)
      Sends a welcome email to a new employee. Contains the username, temporary password, and role details.
      Parameters:
      employeeEmail - The recipient email address.
      employee - The employee entity containing credentials.

    • sendEmailToSubscriber

      public static void sendEmailToSubscriber(Customer customer)
      Sends a welcome email to a new subscriber. Embeds a generated QR code image in the email body (HTML format).
      Parameters:
      customer - The subscriber entity.

    • getContent

      public static String getContent()
      Retrieves the last generated email content.
      Returns:
      The plain text body of the last email.

    • sendReminder

      public static void sendReminder(Order order)
      Sends a reminder email 2 hours before the reservation.
      Parameters:
      order - The order entity requiring a reminder.

    • sendReceipt

      public static void sendReceipt(Customer fullCustomer, Order order)
      Sends a receipt email after the order is paid and finished.
      Parameters:
      fullCustomer - The customer entity with details.
      order - The finished order entity.
